# Indicator Simulation

**Summary**: A geostatistical method used to model categorical variables like lithofacies.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-hassan-2|Hassan, 2016]] used indicator simulation to produce a 3D lithofacies model of the main outcrop body.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The lithofacies model was successfully validated against input data, showing high correlation between upscaled and original facies. ([[2016-hassan-2|Hassan, 2016, p. 138]])
